name: EuiDatePicker
visualDescription: A text input field that, when clicked, reveals a calendar popover below it. The input shows a formatted date/time string and a calendar icon on the right. The popover contains a month grid with day numbers, prev/next month navigation arrows, and optional time-picker inputs. NOT a plain EuiFieldText (has the calendar icon and calendar popover). NOT EuiSuperDatePicker (which is a larger date-range control with quick select options).

dayClassName.description: Applies classes to the numbered days provided. Check docs for example.

fullWidth.description: Renders the input as full width

compressed.description: Renders the input with compressed height and sizing

isInvalid.description: Provides styling to the input when invalid

isLoading.description: Provides styling to the input when loading

onClear.description: What to do when the input is cleared by the x icon

openToDate.description: Opens to this date (in moment format) on first press, regardless of selection

placeholder.description: Shows only when no date is selected

inline.description:
Displays the date picker calendar on directly on the page.
Will not render `iconType` or `fullWidth`.

shadow.description: Allows turning the shadow off if using the `inline` prop

iconType.description: Pass an icon type to change the default `calendar` or `clock` icon

popoverPlacement.description:
Sets the placement of the popover.

**Use [EuiPopover](/#/layout/popover) values**: 'upCenter', 'upLeft', 'upRight', downCenter', 'downLeft', 'downRight', 'leftCenter', 'leftUp', 'leftDown', 'rightCenter', 'rightUp', 'rightDown'.

append.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming before the input.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

Ignored if `inline` or `controlOnly` are true.

prepend.description:
Creates an input group with element(s) coming before the input.
`string` | `ReactElement` or an array of these

Ignored if `inline` or `controlOnly` are true.

controlOnly.description:
Completely removes form control layout wrapper and ignores
`iconType`, `prepend`, and `append`.

Best used inside EuiFormControlLayoutDelimited.

onChange.description: What to do when the input changes

adjustDateOnChange.description: Whether changes to Year and Month (via dropdowns) should trigger `onChange`

calendarClassName.description: Optional class added to the calendar portion of datepicker

customInput.description: Replaces the input with any node, like a button

injectTimes.description: Adds additional times to the time selector other then :30 increments

maxDate.description: The max date accepted (in moment format) as a selection

maxTime.description: The max time accepted (in moment format) as a selection

minDate.description: The min date accepted (in moment format) as a selection

minTime.description: The min time accepted (in moment format) as a selection

onWeekSelect.type: (firstDayOfWeek: Moment, weekNumber: string | number, event?: SyntheticEvent<any, Event>) => void

popperClassName.description: Class applied to the popup, when inline is false

shouldCloseOnSelect.description: Will close the popup on selection

showTimeSelect.description: Show the time selection alongside the calendar

showTimeSelectOnly.description: Only show the time selector, not the calendar

strictParsing.description: Use Moment strict mode, allowing exact format matches only

timeFormat.description: The format of the time within the selector, in moment notation

yearDropdownItemNumber.description: The total number of years to show as options in years selection dropdown
